questionHtml: State a suitable solvent for extracting photosynthetic pigments from plant tissue.
markschemeHtml:
acetone

OR

alcohol

OR

ether

Accept other named organic solvent

If there is more than one answer accept only the first one. (Note: “Water mixed with alcohol” would be correct as would “alcohol, water” but “water, alcohol” would be incorrect)

meta.title: State a suitable solvent for extracting photosynthetic pigments from plant tissue.
